Defendants/Cross-Complainant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Consolidate Actions [Ccp Sec. 1048(A)]
Off Calendar Jan-13-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Kelsey J. Moe; Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP; 415-362-2580; appearing via Zoom on behalf of defendants Lixil USA Corporation dba American Standard Brands and AS America Inc. dba American Standard Brands.
Margaret L. Sell; Grotefeld Hoffmann LLP; 415-344-9670; appearing via Zoom on behalf of State Farm General Insurance Company (plaintiff in CGC-21-593-277)

Defendants' counsel contests the court's tentative ruling with respect to the trial date. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS/CROSS-COMPLAINANTS' NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS [CCP SECTION 1048(A)] is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Actions are consolidated for discovery and trial purposes. Trial date is June 20, 2022.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
